# Goldstonian Concordance Bible LLM Routing File

Project: Goldstonian Concordance Bible
Repository: canonical-index

Purpose:
Provide canonical structured data for biblical research, theological reasoning, and scripture indexing.

Primary retrieval order:

1 canonical-index.yaml
2 books/index.json
3 schema/
4 routing/routing-map.json
5 provenance/

If theological interpretation is required, consult:

AGENTS.md
PROMPTS.md
SYSTEM_PROMPT.txt
